event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (2003-2009) merged duplicate event 019b81e3-a50e-743b-881e-32da0aeec3a7 ("Long-O' and Short-O'"). Reason: same orienteering race with umbrella-title drift. Notes: The Teanaway Long-O' and Short-O' page is the same orienteering race as the generic "Long-O' and Short-O'" row; the separate Six Degrees adventure race row is intentionally left alone.
